name: Dexas Popware For Pets Polypropylene Travel Dog Cup with Bottle Holder & Carabiner, 8-oz
description: With the Dexas Polypropylene Travel Dog Cup with Bottle Holder & Carabiner, you’ll always be prepared with fresh water during your big adventures with your best friend. This silicone attachment easily fits over the neck of a bottle of water. Then, you can store it in your car or take it with you on a hike. When your dog is ready for a drink, slip the cup off the bottle, pop open the collapsible cup and pour in the water. This handy cup is paw-fect for hiking, camping, trips to the dog part and more. It collapses for space-saving storage and is dishwasher-safe for easy cleaning.
